options.name: --input
options.description:
The cobertura XML files to merge into a single
file.

options.name: --output
options.description: The path to write the merged XML file to.

options.name: --log
options.description: (Default: Information) The log level of the output.

options.name: --disable-sanitize
options.description:
(Default: false) Disables fixing errors in the input
files.
